title: rottboellia biflora
intro: Rottboellia biflora, also known as the two-flowered Rottboellia, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Rottboellia biflora include infusions, decoctions, and powdered extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
